parameters.jsCode:
// No vendors to sync - just log and exit
return [{ json: { done: true, message: 'No vendors due for sync', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ last_sync_at: $json.last_sync_at, next_sync_at: $json.next_sync_at, sync_status: $json.sync_success ? 'active' : 'error', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vendor_id: $('Prepare Update').first().json.vendor_id, direction: 'pull', sync_type: $('Prepare Update').first().json.source_type, status: $('Prepare Update').first().json.sync_success ? 'completed' : 'failed', total_products: $('Prepare Update').first().json.product_count || 0, created_products: 0, updated_products: $('Prepare Update').first().json.product_count || 0, error_count: $('Prepare Update').first().json.sync_success ? 0 : 1, details: { source_type: $('Prepare Update').first().json.source_type, error: $('Prepare Update').first().json.error || null, skipped: $('Prepare Update').first().json.skipped || false }, started_at: $('Prepare Update').first().json.last_sync_at, completed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vendor_id: $('Prepare Update').first().json.vendor_id, type: 'sync_error', title: 'Sync Failed: ' + ($('Prepare Update').first().json.source_type || 'unknown'), message: $('Prepare Update').first().json.error || 'Automatic sync failed. Check your source configuration.', severity: 'error', read: false, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Sync completed (with or without errors), log completion
return [{ json: { done: true, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
